mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_idempotent_record ( request_id, business_type, business_key, process_status, response_code, response_message, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{businessType}, #{businessKey}, #{processStatus}, #{responseCode}, #{responseMessage}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT request_id, business_type, business_key, process_status, response_code, response_message, created_time, updated_time FROM t_idempotent_record WHERE request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT request_id, business_type, business_key, process_status, response_code, response_message, created_time, updated_time FROM t_idempotent_record WHERE business_type = #{businessType} ORDER BY created_time DESC
